smartConfig.title: Smart Config prompt guidance
smartConfig.description: Review the resolved prompt, copy it into any supported AI CLI, and complete the configuration flow manually.

remoteMode.title: Remote Mode
remoteMode.description: Configure Hagicode Desktop to connect to a remote Hagicode instance instead of running a local service.

enabled.label: Enable Remote Mode
enabled.description: When enabled, the application will connect to the configured remote Hagicode instance instead of running a local service.

errors.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid HTTP/HTTPS URL
errors.urlRequired: Please enter a remote server URL

messages.saveFailed: Failed to save remote mode configuration
messages.connectionFailed: Connection test failed. Please check the URL and network connection.

notes.modeExplanation: Remote mode allows you to connect to a cloud-deployed Hagicode instance. The local service will be disabled when remote mode is active.

onboarding.title: Onboarding
onboarding.description: Re-run first-time setup wizard to reconfigure data directory, download packages, install dependencies, and start service.
onboarding.restartWizardDescription: Re-run first-time setup wizard to reconfigure data directory, download packages, install dependencies, and start service.

homepageTour.title: Reset Homepage Tour
homepageTour.description: Clear the homepage tour completion state so the guided walkthrough can auto-play again the next time you open System Management.

dataDirectory.title: Data Directory
dataDirectory.description: Configure and manage the data storage location for Hagicode Server.

path.label: Data Directory Location
path.placeholder: Enter the full path to the data directory

errors.invalidPath: Please select a valid data directory path before saving.

messages.restoreFailed: Failed to restore default data directory

validation.invalid: Path is invalid. Please check the error message below.

notes.absolutePathOnly: Note: Only absolute paths are supported. Relative paths are not allowed.

sharingAcceleration.title: Download & Sharing Acceleration
sharingAcceleration.description: Manage torrent-first downloads, trusted cache reuse, and automatic fallback behavior.
sharingAcceleration.enabledDescription: Any asset with torrent metadata starts from torrent first and falls back automatically when needed.
sharingAcceleration.thresholdHint: Assets with torrent metadata are no longer gated by the old 100 MB threshold.
sharingAcceleration.networkHint: Disable sharing acceleration on restricted networks; portable mode always forces it off.
sharingAcceleration.portableModeHint: Portable mode disables sharing acceleration and external seeding, then keeps downloads on HTTP/WebSeed fallback.
sharingAcceleration.saveError: Failed to save sharing acceleration settings
sharingAcceleration.loadError: Failed to load sharing acceleration settings
sharingAcceleration.modeHint: Mode: torrent first, automatic fallback on failure.
sharingAcceleration.scopeHint: External seeding stays focused on latest desktop and latest server. Default cache limit: 5 GiB.

updates.title: Background Updates
updates.description: Manage automatic checks, background predownloads, and verified archive retention.

enabled.label: Enable background predownloads
enabled.description: When a compatible newer version is found, download the archive in the background without switching the current runtime.

retainedArchiveCount.label: Retained archive count
retainedArchiveCount.description: Only verified auto-downloaded archives are kept. Older entries are removed when the limit is exceeded.

messages.saveFailed: Failed to save background update settings

errors.retainedArchiveCountPositive: Retained archive count must be a positive integer.

notes.snapshotModel: The dashboard reminder is driven by a persisted main-process snapshot, so the last known update state survives Desktop reloads.
notes.retentionPolicy: Retention cleanup only removes cached archives and metadata. Installed version directories stay untouched.

telemetry.title: Managed Web Telemetry
telemetry.description: Review and save the telemetry preference Desktop applies to the managed Web service, including whether export is enabled and which OTLP endpoint receives data.

summary.title: Managed Web telemetry status
summary.applyRuleValue: Saved immediately; restart the managed service to fully apply YAML changes.
summary.scopeLocalOnly: Cached locally in Desktop. No installed managed Web version needs YAML sync yet.
summary.scopeSynced: Cached locally in Desktop and synchronized to {{count}} installed managed Web version(s).
summary.scopePartial: Cached locally in Desktop, with {{synced}} of {{total}} installed version(s) synchronized.

enabled.label: Enable managed Web telemetry
enabled.description: Turn managed Web tracing and metrics export on or off while keeping Desktop-local analytics outside the scope of this tab.

endpoint.label: OTLP endpoint
endpoint.description: Leave this blank to preserve the backend default, or point it to the OTLP collector or service that should receive managed Web telemetry.

enablement.title: Enablement scope
enablement.description: When enabled, the managed Web service may emit request, grain, and runtime tracing spans plus operational metrics such as AI latency, token usage, and error outcomes.

endpoint.title: Endpoint guidance
endpoint.description: The endpoint controls where managed Web telemetry is exported. Desktop syncs this value into installed appsettings files without overwriting unrelated OTLP headers, protocol, or timeout settings.

exclusions.title: Sensitive data exclusions
exclusions.description: This disclosure summary excludes raw prompts, secrets, credentials, and other sensitive payload details from the managed Web telemetry categories shown here.

messages.loadFailed: Failed to load managed Web telemetry settings: {{error}}
messages.saveWarning: Managed Web telemetry settings were saved locally, but {{count}} installed version(s) still need YAML synchronization.
messages.saveFailed: Failed to save managed Web telemetry settings: {{error}}

errors.loadTitle: Telemetry settings could not be loaded

notes.applyDescription: Desktop saves this preference immediately, but the managed Web service may need a restart or next launch before the synchronized YAML values fully take effect.
notes.localOnlyTitle: No installed managed Web version yet
notes.localOnlyDescription: Desktop will keep this telemetry preference cached locally so it is ready to synchronize the next time a managed Web runtime is installed.
notes.partialDescription: Desktop saved the local telemetry preference, but {{count}} installed version(s) still need attention: {{versions}}.

footer.copyright: © 2025 Hagicode Desktop. Built with ❤️ using Electron + React + TypeScript.

quickStart.title: Quick Start
quickStart.description: Install embedded web service package and start managing your local PCode instance.

secure.title: Secure
secure.description: Built with security in mind. Your data stays on your machine.

dependencyManagement.title: Dependency Management
dependencyManagement.description: Manage embedded web service packages and system dependencies

tips.title: Tips
tips.description: Keep your dependencies up to date for best performance and security.

versionManagement.title: Version Management
versionManagement.description: Install, switch, and manage Hagicode Server versions
versionManagement.confirmUninstall: Are you sure you want to uninstall this version?
versionManagement.confirmReinstall: Are you sure you want to reinstall this package? This will delete cache and installed version, then download and install again.

noVersionsInstalled.title: No Versions Installed Yet
noVersionsInstalled.description: The easiest way to get started with Hagicode Desktop is through our guided setup wizard. Complete installation and configuration in just a few steps.

info.title: About Version Management
info.description: Version management lets you install multiple Hagicode Server versions, switch between them, and review desktop compatibility before activation.

toast.installSuccessDescription: The version was installed successfully. Start the service manually when you are ready.
toast.installSuccessAutoSwitchedDescription: The version was installed successfully and is now the active version.
toast.installSuccessNoAutoSwitchDescription: The version was installed successfully, but the active version did not change.
toast.installFailedDescription: An error occurred during installation. Please try again.
toast.switchBlocked: This package requires a newer Desktop version.

dialog.reinstallDescription: This will delete cache and installed version, then download and install again. Do you want to continue?
dialog.uninstallDescription: Are you sure you want to uninstall this version? This action cannot be undone.

desktopCompatibility.blockedTitle: Upgrade Desktop to activate this package
desktopCompatibility.upgradeGuidance: Upgrade Hagicode Desktop, then retry switching or starting this package.

portableMode.title: Portable version mode
portableMode.description: Version installation, switching, and package source management are hidden because this build runs from a packaged fixed payload.
portableMode.updates: Updates for this build are managed by the packaged distribution instead of in-app version actions.

installTelemetry.flow: Flow: Fetch torrent -> Torrent-first download -> Fallback backfill (if needed) -> Verify -> Extract -> Complete

progressMessage.torrent-unavailable-fallback: Torrent unavailable, switched to fallback automatically
progressMessage.legacy-http-fallback: No torrent metadata, using HTTP/WebSeed only
